creator: s_gammons@charter.net
text:
See this message and thread

http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=1003104+0+current/freebsd-ports

Fix: 

Commenting out like 46 in the Makefile lets the build start, but it doesn't build mysql-server, so the Makefile is still broken unless you install mysql-server and mysqltcl manually.
How-To-Repeat: Problem occurs with latest ports tree.
